name: test_using_a_case_expression_in_a_where_with_label_predicate

  |                                        ^---

Cypher: MATCH (n)
WHERE (CASE
         WHEN id(n) < 0 THEN size((n)-->(:X))
         ELSE 42
       END) > 0
RETURN n
